description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a rustic, natural finish, constructed from horizontal wooden slats on the front and back, and solid wooden panels on the sides. The box features cut-out handles on both side panels for easy lifting and carrying. The wood grain is visible throughout, with some darker knots and imperfections adding to its character. The interior is open and unobstructed, making it suitable for holding various items such as tools, produce, or miscellaneous urban objects. The construction appears sturdy, with thick corner posts providing structural support. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy, rustic wooden storage box with slatted front and back, solid side panels, and cut-out handles for carrying.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal wooden slats and the open top, with side handles partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wooden panel with a centered cut-out handle and visible wood grain.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with three horizontal slats and an open top, but with different wood grain patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the solid panel and cut-out handle.
